title: Fractal Metascience Paradigm Monograph: NULLO, PLT, UCOMM and Terra Codex Foundations
description: LaTeX monograph package for the Fractal Metascience Paradigm ecosystem, including NULLO, Post Lingua Trace, UCOMM and Terra Codex foundations. This repository-level Zenodo metadata file is maintained to support reproducible release publication from GitHub Actions.
